title: AS Chemistry
intro: Start with foundations, inorganic chemistry, and the first organic routes.

routes.title: Foundations & Inorganic
routes.description: Start here for Period 3, Group 2, Group 17, and the core written equations that support the rest of AS chemistry.

routes.title: Core Organic
routes.description: Start here for hydrocarbons, halogenoalkanes, alcohols, and carbonyls.

routes.title: Acids, Nitrogen & Practical
routes.description: Use this next for carboxylic acids, nitriles, amines, polymers, and common ionic forms.

library_handoff.label: Need more AS documents?
library_handoff.copy: Open the full AS library when you want to browse beyond the featured picks and routes.
